name: FILA Volley Zone Court Shoes
description: The FILA Volley Zone is a purpose-built court shoe for players who need stable lateral support and cushioned comfort. The herringbone tread pattern provides excellent grip on hard court surfaces, while the EVA midsole absorbs impact during quick direction changes.

specifications.cushioning: EVA midsole with memory foam insole

care_instructions: Wipe the outsoles with a damp cloth after play to maintain grip. Remove insoles to air dry after sweaty sessions. Do not machine wash — spot clean the upper with mild soap and water.
